title: Segmentation
meta_description: Reduce system rigidity by dividing a problem into independently changeable parts.
og_description: Reduce system rigidity by dividing a problem into independently changeable parts.

title: Taking Out (Separation)
meta_description: Remove or isolate a problematic or volatile part so the rest of the system can stay stable and simple.
og_description: Remove or isolate a problematic or volatile part so the rest of the system can stay stable and simple.

title: Local Quality
meta_description: Allow different parts of a system to have different properties instead of forcing uniformity everywhere.
og_description: Allow different parts of a system to have different properties instead of forcing uniformity everywhere.

title: Asymmetry
meta_description: Break false symmetry to reduce complexity, cost, or risk by assigning different roles or properties to similar-looking parts.
og_description: Break false symmetry to reduce complexity, cost, or risk by assigning different roles or properties to similar-looking parts.

title: Merging
meta_description: Reduce overhead and latency by combining related elements, activities, or responsibilities when separation creates friction.
og_description: Reduce overhead and latency by combining related elements, activities, or responsibilities when separation creates friction.

title: Universality
meta_description: Reduce system complexity by making one element perform multiple functions instead of introducing new specialized components.
og_description: Reduce system complexity by making one element perform multiple functions instead of introducing new specialized components.

title: Nested Doll
meta_description: Manage complexity by placing systems or components inside others, creating clear containment and layered responsibility.
og_description: Manage complexity by placing systems or components inside others, creating clear containment and layered responsibility.

title: Anti-Weight (Counterbalance)
meta_description: Offset negative forces or constraints by introducing compensating mechanisms instead of fighting them directly.
og_description: Offset negative forces or constraints by introducing compensating mechanisms instead of fighting them directly.

title: Preliminary Anti-Action
meta_description: Reduce risk and cost by performing preventive actions before a problem fully manifests.
og_description: Reduce risk and cost by performing preventive actions before a problem fully manifests.

title: Preliminary Action
meta_description: Accelerate execution by preparing critical elements in advance so the main action becomes simple and fast.
og_description: Accelerate execution by preparing critical elements in advance so the main action becomes simple and fast.

title: Beforehand Cushioning
meta_description: Absorb shocks and uncertainty by building safety buffers into the system before failures occur.
og_description: Absorb shocks and uncertainty by building safety buffers into the system before failures occur.

title: Equipotentiality
meta_description: Reduce unnecessary effort by aligning conditions so work does not have to fight against artificial differences.
og_description: Reduce unnecessary effort by aligning conditions so work does not have to fight against artificial differences.

title: The Other Way Around (Inversion)
meta_description: Solve a problem by reversing actions, relationships, or assumptions instead of optimizing the existing direction.
og_description: Solve a problem by reversing actions, relationships, or assumptions instead of optimizing the existing direction.

title: Spheroidality / Curvature
meta_description: Increase adaptability and robustness by replacing rigid, linear structures with flexible, curved, or adaptive ones.
og_description: Increase adaptability and robustness by replacing rigid, linear structures with flexible, curved, or adaptive ones.

title: Dynamics
meta_description: Allow a system to change its structure, behavior, or parameters over time instead of remaining static.
og_description: Allow a system to change its structure, behavior, or parameters over time instead of remaining static.

title: Partial or Excessive Actions
meta_description: Achieve better results by deliberately doing less or more than the nominal requirement instead of aiming for exactness.
og_description: Achieve better results by deliberately doing less or more than the nominal requirement instead of aiming for exactness.

title: Another Dimension
meta_description: Unlock new solution space by moving the problem into an additional dimension instead of optimizing within the same plane.
og_description: Unlock new solution space by moving the problem into an additional dimension instead of optimizing within the same plane.

title: Mechanical Vibration
meta_description: Improve performance by introducing controlled oscillation, iteration, or repetition instead of static operation.
og_description: Improve performance by introducing controlled oscillation, iteration, or repetition instead of static operation.

title: Periodic Action
meta_description: Replace continuous or one-time actions with periodic ones to reduce load, cost, and risk while maintaining effectiveness.
og_description: Replace continuous or one-time actions with periodic ones to reduce load, cost, and risk while maintaining effectiveness.

title: Continuity of Useful Action
meta_description: Maximize value creation by ensuring the system is always performing useful work instead of waiting or idling.
og_description: Maximize value creation by ensuring the system is always performing useful work instead of waiting or idling.

title: Skipping (Rushing Through)
meta_description: Reduce negative effects or inefficiencies by executing certain steps very quickly or bypassing them when their duration adds no value.
og_description: Reduce negative effects or inefficiencies by executing certain steps very quickly or bypassing them when their duration adds no value.

title: Blessing in Disguise
meta_description: Turn a harmful effect or constraint into a useful feature instead of eliminating it.
og_description: Turn a harmful effect or constraint into a useful feature instead of eliminating it.

title: Feedback
meta_description: Improve control and outcomes by continuously feeding results back into the system to adjust behavior.
og_description: Improve control and outcomes by continuously feeding results back into the system to adjust behavior.

title: Intermediary
meta_description: Reduce coupling and conflict by introducing an intermediate element that manages interaction between parts.
og_description: Reduce coupling and conflict by introducing an intermediate element that manages interaction between parts.

title: Self-Service
meta_description: Reduce coordination cost and delays by letting a system or user perform needed actions independently.
og_description: Reduce coordination cost and delays by letting a system or user perform needed actions independently.

title: Copying
meta_description: Reduce cost, risk, or complexity by using copies, templates, or simplified representations instead of originals.
og_description: Reduce cost, risk, or complexity by using copies, templates, or simplified representations instead of originals.

title: Cheap Short-Living Objects
meta_description: Reduce risk and cost by using temporary, disposable, or easily replaceable elements instead of durable ones.
og_description: Reduce risk and cost by using temporary, disposable, or easily replaceable elements instead of durable ones.

title: Mechanics Substitution
meta_description: Replace rigid, manual, or mechanical approaches with more flexible, informational, or automated ones.
og_description: Replace rigid, manual, or mechanical approaches with more flexible, informational, or automated ones.

title: Pneumatics and Hydraulics
meta_description: Transmit force, control, or influence indirectly through flexible, buffered media instead of rigid connections.
og_description: Transmit force, control, or influence indirectly through flexible, buffered media instead of rigid connections.

title: Flexible Shells and Thin Films
meta_description: Protect core elements while keeping the system lightweight and adaptable by adding flexible, minimal protective layers.
og_description: Protect core elements while keeping the system lightweight and adaptable by adding flexible, minimal protective layers.

title: Porous Materials
meta_description: Increase adaptability and resilience by allowing controlled permeability instead of enforcing total isolation.
og_description: Increase adaptability and resilience by allowing controlled permeability instead of enforcing total isolation.

title: Color Changes
meta_description: Improve understanding, control, and reaction speed by making system states and risks immediately visible.
og_description: Improve understanding, control, and reaction speed by making system states and risks immediately visible.

title: Homogeneity
meta_description: Reduce friction and complexity by making interacting elements similar in nature, structure, or rules.
og_description: Reduce friction and complexity by making interacting elements similar in nature, structure, or rules.

title: Discarding and Recovering
meta_description: Improve flow and resilience by intentionally removing elements when they are no longer useful, while keeping the ability to restore them if needed.
og_description: Improve flow and resilience by intentionally removing elements when they are no longer useful, while keeping the ability to restore them if needed.

title: Parameter Changes
meta_description: Improve outcomes by changing key parameters instead of redesigning the entire system.
og_description: Improve outcomes by changing key parameters instead of redesigning the entire system.

title: Phase Transitions
meta_description: Achieve step-change improvements by moving the system into a different operating state instead of incremental optimization.
og_description: Achieve step-change improvements by moving the system into a different operating state instead of incremental optimization.

title: Thermal Expansion
meta_description: Exploit expansion, contraction, or elasticity effects to adapt to changing conditions without redesign.
og_description: Exploit expansion, contraction, or elasticity effects to adapt to changing conditions without redesign.

title: Strong Oxidants
meta_description: Achieve radical improvement by introducing a more powerful, transformative mechanism instead of incremental enhancement.
og_description: Achieve radical improvement by introducing a more powerful, transformative mechanism instead of incremental enhancement.

title: Inert Atmosphere
meta_description: Stabilize sensitive operations by isolating them from disruptive external influences.
og_description: Stabilize sensitive operations by isolating them from disruptive external influences.

title: Composite Materials
meta_description: Combine different elements to achieve properties that none of them provide alone.
og_description: Combine different elements to achieve properties that none of them provide alone.

title: Contradiction Formulation (Engineering Contradiction)
meta_description: Turn a messy situation into a solvable TRIZ problem by expressing it as a trade-off between two parameters.
og_description: Turn a messy situation into a solvable TRIZ problem by expressing it as a trade-off between two parameters.

title: Physical Contradiction + Separation Principles
meta_description: Break a deadlock where the same parameter must be simultaneously high and low by separating requirements across conditions.
og_description: Break a deadlock where the same parameter must be simultaneously high and low by separating requirements across conditions.
